chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal.Misc. Application No.S-22 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing on main case. 13-02-2025 Mr. Mehfooz Ali Laghari advocate for applicant. Mr. Akhtar Ali Panhwar advocate for the respondent No.3, 4 & 6 Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G a/w Inspector Noor Muhammad Sheikh SHO PS Chhore. = Mr. Mehfooz Ali Laghrai is appeared along with applicant Ambreen and her sister/detenue Mst Urooj w/o Aijaz, daughter of Peero has been produced by SHO PS Chhore along with LHC Ahsana of PS Chhore, on the other hand Aijaz, Nawaz Abro and Haji Abro are present. I have heard the parties at length and the detenue has categorically stated that she has been confined wrongfully by her husband/respondent No.3 and his brothers. She does not want to stay with her husband/respondent No.3. On the other hand learned counsel appeared on behalf of respondents No.3, 4 and 6 Mr. Akhtar Ali Panhwar has no objection and requested let a chance may be given for reconciliation with the applicant. In view of above, the detenue namely Mst Urooj w/o Aijaz, daughter of Peero is allowed to stay with the applicant as her sister as per her own choice as the law permits that it is the choice and willingness of every citizen to live his/her life as guaranteed by the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1976. The application stands disposed of. JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
